---
title: "Miss Lowden"
---

## Miss Lowden

### Description

schoolmistress at Frome Selwood

### Biography

This may be the school at Chantry near Frome attended by the novelist Ellen Mathers, and described by her in <i>Comin\' Thro\' the Rye</i> (1875).  What was also perhaps the same school appears on the Frome Selwood 1841 census as an asylum kept by Julia Field, who was the mother of Ellen Julia (Field) Johns.

### Letters

- Letter from Dec 30th [1866?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
